title: Extended Messaging Frontends (WeChat, Telegram, Feishu)

classes.name: WxBotClient
classes.notes: Inline WeChat bot client; polls ilinkai.weixin.qq.com API; AES-ECB CDN file upload/download

module_level_components.name: WeChatApp (wechatapp module)
module_level_components.message_handling: on_message() → _dl_media() for attachments → agent.put_task(prompt, source='wechat') in daemon thread → dq.get() → _clean/_split → bot.send_text()/send_file()

module_level_components.name: TelegramHandler (tgapp module)
module_level_components.message_handling: handle_msg() → agent.put_task(prompt, source='telegram') → asyncio.create_task(_stream(dq, msg)); _stream() polls dq, edits Telegram message live, sends files on done

module_level_components.name: FeishuClient (fsapp module)
key_functions: send_message(receive_id, content, msg_type='text', use_card=False, receive_id_type='open_id') -> str|None
module_level_components.message_handling: handle_message(data) → _build_user_message() → handle_command() if '/' prefix, else daemon thread run_agent() → agent.put_task(user_input, source='feishu', images=image_paths) → poll dq → update_message() live → _send_generated_files() on done

format_restore.purpose: Restore prior conversation history from file

key_relationships: WxBotClient uses requests (HTTP polling to WeChat ilinkai API)
WxBotClient uses AES (PyCryptodome) for CDN media encryption
TelegramHandler depends_on python-telegram-bot (ApplicationBuilder, MessageHandler, CommandHandler, HTTPXRequest)
TelegramHandler depends_on mykeys (for token, proxy, allowed users)
FeishuClient depends_on lark_oapi (lark.Client, EventDispatcherHandler, ws.Client, im.v1 APIs)
FeishuClient depends_on mykeys (for APP_ID, APP_SECRET, allowed users)
All three frontends share identical agent threading pattern: put_task() → daemon thread polls dq → streaming updates → file delivery
architectural_pattern: All three frontends are thin adapters: receive platform-specific events → extract text/media → call GeneraticAgent.put_task() → stream results back. No inheritance between frontends. WeChatApp is the only one with a dedicated client class (WxBotClient); TelegramHandler and FeishuClient use module-level functions only.
important_notes: WxBotClient is defined inline in wechatapp.py (not an external import)
Single-instance lock via socket binding: WeChatApp=19528, Telegram=19527
TelegramHandler uses async/await + asyncio; WeChatApp and FeishuClient use threading.Thread
FeishuClient supports group chat (chat_id) and DM (open_id) modes
Feishu uses long-polling WebSocket (lark.ws.Client); Telegram uses run_polling(); WeChat uses manual get_updates loop
All frontends support /stop and /llm commands via GeneraticAgent.abort()/next_llm()
Media types supported: WeChat=image/video/file/voice via CDN; Telegram=photo/document; Feishu=image/audio/file/media/post/interactive
